phases.title: Stabilise
phases.subtitle: Stop the financial bleed, create breathing room

goals.text: Establish one reliable income stream (session work, consultancy, or teaching)
Register all IP through Overbeck Music Ltd — system designs, methods, catalogue
Submit Arts Council England grant application
Submit Innovate UK grant application (CHI paper as credential)
Choose one system (Manibus or Silver Dolphin) and finish to stageable, demonstrable standard
Perform publicly with chosen system and document professionally
Produce and release one strong performance video
Build sync-ready catalogue — minimum 2–3 tracks per month via Overbeck Music Ltd
License or sell system designs to artists or manufacturers
Launch boutique hardware run (Manibus units at boutique pricing)
Establish direct sync licensing — contact music supervisors directly
Sign first external artist to Overbeck Music Ltd publisher side
Catalogue royalties compounding as primary income stream
Licensed hardware generating revenue without active time investment
Overbeck Music Ltd operating as a business with a signed roster

immediateActions.text: Assess current status of Manibus — determine if stageable within 6 months
Assess current status of Silver Dolphin — same evaluation
Choose which system to prioritise for Phase 2 entry point
